# Audit RACI

## Purpose
This document defines the roles and responsibilities for preparing, reviewing, approving, and supporting audit-related documentation and evidence.

## Guidance for completion
Use one row per audit area, evidence domain, or response activity. Ensure each row has one clear accountable owner.

| Audit Area / Activity | Responsible | Accountable | Consulted | Informed | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Control Mapping |  |  |  |  |  |
| Evidence Collection |  |  |  |  |  |
| Risk Register |  |  |  |  |  |
| Policy Mapping |  |  |  |  |  |
| Cutover Readiness Evidence |  |  |  |  |  |
| Benefits Realization Evidence |  |  |  |  |  |
